creator: Meyser+bugs.freebsd.org@xenet.de
text:
After update from 9.1-Stable to 10.0-BETA3 i cant access any disk behind a
Portmultiplier.

Devices:

siis0@pci0:1:5:0:       class=0x018000 card=0x31241095 chip=0x31241095 rev=0x02 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Silicon Image, Inc.'
    device     = 'SiI 3124 PCI-X Serial ATA Controller'
    class      = mass storage

Bootlog:

siis0: <SiI3124 SATA controller> port 0xcc00-0xcc0f mem 0xf9fffc00-0xf9fffc7f,0xf9ff0000-0xf9ff7fff irq 16 at device 5.0 on pci1
siisch0: <SIIS channel> at channel 0 on siis0
siisch1: <SIIS channel> at channel 1 on siis0
siisch2: <SIIS channel> at channel 2 on siis0
siisch3: <SIIS channel> at channel 3 on siis0

pmp0 at siisch0 bus 0 scbus0 target 15 lun 0
pmp0: <Port Multiplier 47261095 1f06> ATA-0 device
pmp0: 300.000MB/s transfers (SATA 2.x, NONE, PIO 8192bytes)
pmp0: 5 fan-out ports

pmp1 at siisch1 bus 0 scbus1 target 15 lun 0
pmp1: <Port Multiplier 47261095 1f06> ATA-0 device
pmp1: 300.000MB/s transfers (SATA 2.x, NONE, PIO 8192bytes)
pmp1: 5 fan-out ports

Camcontrol Output:

<Port Multiplier 47261095 1f06>    at scbus0 target 15 lun 0 (pmp0,pass2)
<Port Multiplier 47261095 1f06>    at scbus1 target 15 lun 0 (pmp1,pass3)
<WDC WD740HLFS-01G6U1 04.04V02>    at scbus4 target 0 lun 0 (pass0,ada0)
<HL-DT-ST DVDRAM GT20N CQ01>       at scbus5 target 0 lun 0 (pass1,cd0)


If some disks are connected i get an endless loop of:
